title: AI Lead Rescue homepage hero
description: Above-the-fold hero on the AI Lead Rescue landing surface (https://corpflowai.com/lead-rescue and aileadrescue.corpflowai.com). Premium architectural editorial photograph: a tidy desk corner with a leather portfolio, ceramic mug, brushed-brass bookend with paper folders, and a fountain pen on a notebook. Communicates calm operational competence; no people, no electronics, no text.

licence.terms: Generated under the CorpFlowAI vetted prompt library (see CORPFLOW_PROMPT_LIBRARY.md, prompt_id: lead-rescue-hero-photography). Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md. No third-party IP used. Free to use across CorpFlowAI marketing surfaces.

accessibility.alt: A calm sunlit desk corner with a closed leather portfolio, a ceramic mug with rising steam, a brushed-brass bookend holding three paper folders, and a fountain pen on a notebook against a deep navy wall and a warm cream linen panel.

usage.notes: RETIRED. Superseded by the dark photo+glass system: /lead-rescue now renders a full-bleed fixed hero background (placeholder manifest lead-rescue-spa-sunset-hero-v1) via PublicMarketingPhotoGlassShell, so the in-flow editorial desk hero is no longer rendered. Kept for provenance/history only; not eligible for selection while retired.

prompt_provenance.notes: First production hero for AI Lead Rescue. Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md — calm, premium, operational, real, no AI tropes. Same visual system as the homepage hero (deep navy + warm cream + walnut + brushed brass).
